zh.lifeSummary: Phillis Bassett是Richard Basset和Agnes Jeffes的女兒，於1528年出生在英國哈普爾奧維 瓦洛普。她於1549年8月8日與Richard Pyle在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾索莫斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1594年在英國享年66歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾奧維 瓦洛普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Phillis Bassett是Richard Basset和Agnes Jeffes的女儿，于1528年出生在英国哈普爾奧維 瓦洛普。她于1549年8月8日与Richard Pyle在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾索莫斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1594年在英国享年66岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾奧維 瓦洛普。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Phillis
meanings:
Greek: An old female baptismal name, derived from the Greek Phyllis, name of a countrywoman introduced in Virgil's Eclogues, and of a nurse of Lycurgus, King of Thrace, and of a nurse of the Emperor Domitian. From Greek words meaning a green branch covered with leaves, a leaf, 
foliage, a heap of leaves; in Herod. 8, 24, a bed of leaves. In one instance (mentioned in Notes and Queries 5th S. i. 357) the name Phillis has been corrupted from Felicia

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Phillis Bassett was born in 1528, in Over Wallop, Hampshire, England as the daughter of Richard Basset and Agnes Jeffes. She married Richard Pyle on 8 August 1549, in Somers, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1594, in England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Over Wallop, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Phillis Bassett est née en 1528, à Over Wallop, Hampshire, Angleterre, fille de Richard Basset et Agnes Jeffes. Elle a épousé Richard Pyle le 8 août 1549, à Somers, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1594, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Over Wallop, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Phillis Bassett wurde 1528 in Over Wallop, Hampshire, England, als Tochter von Richard Basset und Agnes Jeffes geboren. Sie hat am 8. August 1549 in Somers, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Richard Pyle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1594 im Alter von 66 Jahren in England und wurde in Over Wallop, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Phillis Bassett è nata il nel 1528 nel Over Wallop, Hampshire, England come figlia di Richard Basset e Agnes Jeffes. Lei sposato Richard Pyle il 8 agosto 1549, nel Somers, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1594, nel England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Over Wallop, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Phillis Bassettは1528年にイギリスハンプシュアイアオバー ワロップでRichard BassetとAgnes Jeffesの娘として生まれた。1549年8月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアソメルズでRichard Pyleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1594年にイギリスで66歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアオバー ワロップにて埋葬された。

ko.Upper Wallop, Hampshire, England: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 서머스
ko.lifeSummary: Phillis Bassett(은)는 1528년 영국 함프실르 버 월로프에서 Richard Basset(와)과 Agnes Jeffes의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1549년 8월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 서머스에서 Richard Pyle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1594년 영국에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 버 월로프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Phillis Bassett nasceu em 1528, em Over Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra filha de Richard Basset e Agnes Jeffes. Ela casou-se com Richard Pyle em 8 de agosto de 1549, em Somers, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1594, em Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Over Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Upper Wallop, Hampshire, England: сомирс, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Phillis Bassett родилась в 1528 г. в местности овир валлоп, хампшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Richard Basset и Agnes Jeffes. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Pyle 8 августа 1549 г. в местности сомирс, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1594 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности овир валлоп, хампшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Phillis Bassett nació en 1528, en Over Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra como hija de Richard Basset y Agnes Jeffes. Se casó con Richard Pyle el 8 de agosto de 1549, en Somers, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1594, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Over Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
